user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Implement 3-phase PWM motor control on TC387 using GTM TOM1 with complementary outputs and dead-time.
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3-phase center-aligned PWM at 20 kHz with 1 µs dead-time on six TOM1 outputs mapped to P02.{0,7} (U), P02.{1,4} (V), P02.{2,5} (W). Start and update channels synchronously. Initialize with U=25%, V=50%, W=75%; on each 500 ms tick, increase each by 10% with wrap rule (if duty+step >= 100 then 0 then add step). Provide GTM enable guard (check MODULE_GTM.CLC.B.DISS, enable GTM, enable GCLK and FXCLK0). Define empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction. Run a 2 Hz GTM ATOM timer ISR on CPU0 priority 20 toggling P13.0.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to configure three complementary half-bridge pairs on TOM1 for center-aligned PWM with programmable dead-time and synchronized updates. Guard GTM enable with IfxGtm_isEnabled/IfxGtm_enable and enable CMU clocks via IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks. Route TOM1 outputs to P02.x using IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout. Use IfxGtm_Atom_Timer to generate a 2 Hz periodic interrupt and IfxCpu_Irq_installInterruptHandler for the ISR that toggles P13.0. Schedule 500 ms duty updates using the STM tick helper.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: PwmHl provides complementary outputs with dead-time and synchronized, center-aligned updates required for a 3-phase inverter. The unified IfxGtm_Pwm would drop complementary/dead-time handling. Mandatory header selection requires IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl.

runtime_function.name: updateGtmTom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Apply percent-based duty updates to the three phases with 10% step and wrap rule, committing synchronized center-aligned updates.

migration_notes.context_preserved: The solution uses IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to realize complementary PWM with 1 µs dead-time and synchronized, center-aligned updates at 20 kHz on TOM1, matching the motor-control requirement. GTM enable guard is implemented via IfxGtm_isEnabled/IfxGtm_enable and CMU clock enable. Pins are routed on P02.x via IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout. The 500 ms scheduler and the empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction hook are preserved. A 2 Hz ATOM timer ISR on CPU0 priority 20 is created using IfxGtm_Atom_Timer and installed with IfxCpu_Irq_installInterruptHandler to toggle P13.0. Note: On TC38x LFBGA-516, P02.{0,1,2,4,5,7} map to TOM1 channels in Cluster_0; if Cluster_1 is mandatory, adjust pin routing to TOM1[8..15] capable pads. Otherwise, keep P02.x and use TOM1 Cluster_0 while preserving all timing and update semantics.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
